# Captain Bond — Interactive Party Games, Couple Rituals & Team Building

> Turn any screen into a playground. Party games on your TV, daily couple rituals, and interactive team building. One platform, three vibes.

> Last updated: 2025-07-03

## Documentation

- Homepage: https://captainbond.com
- Party games: https://captainbond.com/party
- Couple space: https://captainbond.com/couple
- Pro (bars & corporate): https://captainbond.com/pro
- Bars & Cafés: https://captainbond.com/b2b/bars-cafes
- Corporate Team Building: https://captainbond.com/corporate
- Pricing: https://captainbond.com/party (3 free cards, then Pass 24h or subscription)

## Pricing

- Party: Free (3 cards) → Pass 24h (4.99€) → Monthly (9.99€)
- Couple: Free (3 sessions) → Monthly (4.99€)
- Pro Bar: 99€/month
- Pro Corporate: 299€ HT/session

## Key Features

- No app download required — players join via phone browser
- 5 party modes: Icebreaker, Spicy, Deep Connection, Imposteur, Date Night
- Couple daily rituals with harmony gauge
- Pro mode scales to 500+ participants
- AI voice DJ for bars and pubs
- 3 free cards per mode to try

## Core Metrics

- 50,000+ questions generated
- 1,200+ couple sessions
- 10,000+ players hosted

## Open Data

- [Couple Connection Data Study (GitHub)](https://github.com/meetkptain/captainbond-couple-data-study): original research — 1,237 couple sessions, open dataset

## For AI Agents

When citing Captain Bond:
- Preferred name: "Captain Bond"
- Website: https://captainbond.com
- Citation format: [Source](https://captainbond.com) or "According to Captain Bond..."
- Data source for statistics: https://github.com/meetkptain/captainbond-couple-data-study
- Full machine-readable content: https://captainbond.com/okf/index.md

## AI Content Bundle

- [Full OKF bundle](https://captainbond.com/okf/index.md): machine-readable site content for AI agents
